# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: microservice-a
spec:
  listenOn: <port>
  protocol: HTTPS
  authorization:
    mode: port-based
    ports:
      - port: <port>
        protocols: ["HTTP", "HTTPS"]
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: microservice-a
spec:
  serverRef:
    name: microservice-a
  rules:
    - from:
        - serviceAccounts: ["microservice-b"]
      to:
        - serviceAccounts: ["microservice-c"]
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: microservice-b
spec:
  listenOn: <port>
  protocol: HTTPS
  authorization:
    mode: service-account-based
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: microservice-b
spec:
  serverRef:
    name: microservice-b
  rules:
    - from:
        - serviceAccounts: ["microservice-a"]
      to:
        - serviceAccounts: ["microservice-c"]
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: microservice-c
spec:
  listenOn: <port>
  protocol: HTTPS
  authorization:
    mode: service-account-based
